gates.title: Strict publish sync gate
gates.nextAction: Run the runtime-only non-writing strict sync gate after the intended branch is pushed.
stopConditions: Stop if the worktree is dirty and no owner has requested staging, committing, pushing, tagging, releasing, or publishing.
Stop if upstream sync cannot be verified from the local git state.
gates.boundary: Committed gap-register snapshots do not close strict sync; only the runtime-only non-writing strict sync audit proves current local upstream sync.

gates.title: Owner license decision
gates.nextAction: Owner chooses a reuse license or keeps the no-reuse boundary.
stopConditions: Stop if no owner decision exists.
Stop if the request would require legal advice.
gates.boundary: Does not choose a license or provide legal advice.

gates.title: One permissioned external weak artifact
gates.nextAction: Collect one user-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted weak artifact.
stopConditions: Stop if permission, redaction, or submitter scope is unclear.
Stop if the artifact contains secrets or private personal data that should not enter the case trail.
gates.boundary: Does not create external proof or grant permission.

gates.title: Completed permissioned before/after case
gates.nextAction: Run the reviewed artifact through the full case path and preserve the boundary check.
stopConditions: Stop if the case lacks before/after artifacts.
Stop if the boundary check does not preserve what remains unproven.
Stop if reviewed evidence is missing.
gates.boundary: Does not prove improvement, adoption, or outcome until the before/after case evidence exists.

gates.title: npm package publication
gates.nextAction: After license and sync gates close, owner decides whether npm publication is in scope.
stopConditions: Stop if package.json remains private.
Stop if the license decision is pending.
Stop if strict sync has not passed.
gates.boundary: Dry-run package checks are not npm publication.

gates.title: Tagged GitHub Action or Marketplace publication
gates.nextAction: Owner decides whether a tagged public action release or Marketplace listing is in scope.
stopConditions: Stop if no tag or Marketplace release evidence exists.
Stop if the repository-local action metadata is the only evidence.
gates.boundary: Repository-local action metadata is not Marketplace publication.

gates.title: Shipped plugin or connector proof
gates.nextAction: Produce a real tagged plugin/action release or installation proof before shipped-plugin claims.
stopConditions: Stop if only local plugin scaffolds exist.
Stop if no install or release evidence can be attached.
gates.boundary: Local plugin scaffolds and install-readiness packets are not shipped plugins.

gates.title: Benchmarked productivity evidence
gates.nextAction: Run the measurement protocol and review the resulting evidence before productivity claims.
stopConditions: Stop if no measured before/after study exists.
Stop if evidence has not been reviewed.
gates.boundary: Measurement protocol only; no benchmark claim without direct evidence.

gates.title: External adoption evidence
gates.nextAction: Collect and review real external usage evidence before adoption claims.
gates.firstCommand: Create or collect a reviewed adoption evidence packet from templates/evidence-packet.md.
stopConditions: Stop if public repository visibility is the only evidence.
Stop if the evidence is not external, permissioned, or reviewed.
gates.boundary: Read-only public repository visibility is not external adoption.

nextBestActions.nextAction: Run the runtime-only non-writing strict sync gate after the intended branch is pushed.
nextBestActions.boundary: Committed gap-register snapshots do not close strict sync; only the runtime-only non-writing strict sync audit proves current local upstream sync.

nextBestActions.nextAction: Owner chooses a reuse license or keeps the no-reuse boundary.
nextBestActions.boundary: Does not choose a license or provide legal advice.

nextBestActions.nextAction: Collect one user-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted weak artifact.
nextBestActions.boundary: Does not create external proof or grant permission.

allowedClaim: Mimesis has a local current state summary that is not proof; it summarizes open gates and next actions from existing local packets.
disallowedClaim: The current state summary does not close gates, prove completion, publish, choose a license, create external proof, prove adoption, prove benchmarked productivity, or prove shipped-plugin status.
